name: PragmARC.Data_Structures.Bags.Unbounded.Unprotected

record_types.name: Find_Result

subprograms.name: Add
subprograms.code: procedure Add (Into : in out Handle; Item : in Element)

documentation.description:
Adds Item to Into.
Raises Storage_Exhausted if we cannot obtain memory to store Item in Into.
Into is unchanged if Storage_Exhausted is raised
Time: O(1)

Makes Bag empty. All bags are initially empty.

Time: O(N)

subprograms.name: Delete
subprograms.code: procedure Delete (From : in out Handle; Item : in Element)

documentation.description:
If From contains an Element X such that X = Item, deletes X from From;
otherwise, has no effect.
If From contains more than one such Element, deletes one of these Elements.

Time: O(N)

parameters.name: From
parameters.description: with Post => From'Old.Size >= From.Size; -- 'Old cannot be used with a limited type

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description: with Post => From'Old.Size >= From.Size; -- 'Old cannot be used with a limited type

subprograms.name: Empty
subprograms.code: function Empty (Bag : in Handle) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Returns True if Bag contains no elements; returns False otherwise

Time: O(1)

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code: function Find (Bag : in Handle; Key : in Element) return Find_Result

documentation.description:
If Bag contains an Element X such that X = Key, returns (Found => True, Item => X);
otherwise, returns (Found => False).
If Bag contains more than one such Element, returns one of these Elements
as the Item component of the result.

Time: O(N)

subprograms.name: Iterate

documentation.description: Applies Action to each Element in Over in some unspecified order, until every Element in Over has been processed

subprograms.name: Size
subprograms.code: function Size (Bag : in Handle) return Natural

documentation.description:
Returns the number of elements stored in Bag

Time: O(1)

subprograms.name: Update
subprograms.code: procedure Update (Bag : in out Handle; Item : in Element)

documentation.description:
If Bag contains an Element X such that X = Item, performs X := Item;
otherwise, has no effect.
If Bag contains more than one such Element, updates one of these Elements.

Time: O(N)

formals.code: function "=" (Left : in Element; Right : in Element) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Returns True if Left and Right are equal; returns False otherwise.
"=" is often implemented to compare only part of the elements (the Key).
